verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Prefer official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence when accessible; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing official Discord.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Public HTML identifies Sailor Piece by Shadowrise Devs, dateModified 06/01/2026, max level 20000, and says the community server carries exclusive reward codes. It does not expose current code strings in accessible HTML.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Fetched after clearing local proxy variables. Invite resolves/canonicalizes to discord.com/invite/sailorpiece and identifies the Official Discord Server of Shadowrise Devs Sailor Piece with about 1,450,448 members. Public HTML does not expose code-list or game-announcements messages, so it is not direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board and public board JSON
sources.notes: Board JSON was accessible after clearing local proxy variables. The Actives Codes card was last active 2026-02-28 and still lists stale early codes such as 30KCCU, UPD5, 7.5KFOLLOWTY, 10KFOLLOWTY, 12.5KFOLLOWTY, ROGUE, and SORRYFORISSUEANDRESTART. It does not contain any of the 11 retained active codes and was not used as current active proof.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Article dated/updated June 4, 2026 and says it looked for new codes. It lists 11 active codes: the two May 25 additions, all three restart-bug variants, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS. It lists older predecessor codes as expired.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Last updated June 2, 2026 and says it checked for new codes and confirmed its list active. It lists 10 active codes: the two May 25 additions, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and RAIDS. It lists level 12,500 for newest/restart/content codes and level 7,500 for GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG expired.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Article says it checked for new Sailor Piece codes on June 1, 2026. It lists the retained active set with exact rewards and says codes arrive in the official Discord code-list channel. It also keeps some older predecessor codes active, so those older rows remain conflict/stale evidence rather than restoration proof.

sources.name: Dexerto Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 1, 2026 to confirm active codes. It lists 21 active codes including all 11 retained here and provides exact rewards for the two newest codes plus many retained codes. It points readers to the official Discord server for more codes. It conflicts on MASTERY rewards and keeps older predecessor codes active.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Modified May 27, 2026 with May 25 Ghoul Update notes. It exposes 10 active codes: the two May 25 additions, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG inactive and says new codes are posted in the official Discord game-announcements channel.

sources.name: Pocket Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 1, 2026 and says a new code was added. It lists the two May 25 additions plus SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, RAIDS, and several older predecessor codes as active. It omits SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG.

sources.name: PC Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Last updated June 2, 2026. It says the last two updates are still alive and lists only 1BIL500MILVISITSTYSM and FREECODEFORYALLL2 as active, with exact rewards matching the stored bundles. Treated as strong support for the two newest codes and omission conflict for other retained active codes, not official expiry proof.

sources.name: PCGamesN Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated June 4, 2026. It lists the two May 25 additions and all three restart-bug variants as active/current, but places SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and many older codes in expired text. It also conflicts with the stored rewards for the two newest codes.

sources.name: SailorPieceWiki codes overview
sources.notes: Search result/web snapshot says checked 2026-05-24 and lists 10 active codes including the two May 25 additions, MASTERY, GHOULUPDATE, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, FREECODEFORYALL, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, and all three restart-bug variants. Older than today, so used only as supporting snapshot evidence.

decisions.reason: Kept active because Destructoid June 4, GamesRadar June 2, Beebom June 1, Dexerto June 1, Pocket Gamer June 1, Pro Game Guides May 27, PC Gamer June 2, and PCGamesN June 4 support it as active/current. Stored reward bundle remains supported by Beebom, Dexerto, and PC Gamer; level 12500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Destructoid June 4, GamesRadar June 2, Beebom June 1, Dexerto June 1, Pocket Gamer June 1, and Pro Game Guides May 27 list it active/current, while PCGamesN June 4 lists it expired and PC Gamer omits it. Active evidence still outweighs non-official expiry/omission evidence. Level 12500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active with conflict. Destructoid June 4, GamesRadar June 2, Beebom June 1, Dexerto June 1, Pocket Gamer June 1, and Pro Game Guides May 27 list it active/current, while PCGamesN June 4 lists it expired and PC Gamer omits it. Beebom/Dexerto support the stored bundle; level 7500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active with conflict. Destructoid June 4, GamesRadar June 2, Beebom June 1, Dexerto June 1, Pocket Gamer June 1, and Pro Game Guides May 27 list it active/current, while PCGamesN June 4 lists it expired and PC Gamer omits it. Beebom supports the stored no-raid-key bundle; Dexerto conflicts. Level 7500 remains based on GamesRadar.

Kept active because Destructoid June 4, GamesRadar June 2, Beebom June 1, Dexerto June 1, Pocket Gamer June 1, and Pro Game Guides May 27 list it active/current. PCGamesN and PC Gamer omit it, but neither gives official expiry proof. Level 7500 remains based on GamesRadar.
No official source or credible current source surfaced a new code beyond the existing retained active set. Destructoid June 4 says it looked for new codes and still lists the same 11 active codes.

No active code had strong enough official or cross-source expiry evidence to move today. Conflicts remain for SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS, but active-source evidence still exists and official code-channel evidence was not accessible.

source_conflicts.conflict: Destructoid June 4, Beebom June 1, Dexerto June 1, and PCGamesN June 4 list it active/current. GamesRadar June 2 lists it expired, Pro Game Guides lists it inactive, Pocket Gamer omits it, and PC Gamer only lists the two May 25 additions.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or another strong current source joins explicit expired evidence.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN updated June 4 lists these as expired and PC Gamer lists only the two May 25 additions. Destructoid June 4, GamesRadar June 2, Beebom June 1, Dexerto June 1, Pocket Gamer June 1, and Pro Game Guides May 27 still list these active/current.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep active until official evidence or stronger current-source expiry agreement appears.

source_conflicts.conflict: PCGamesN and PC Gamer omit RAIDS. Destructoid June 4, GamesRadar June 2, Beebom June 1, Dexerto June 1, Pocket Gamer June 1, and Pro Game Guides May 27 list it active/current.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep active until official evidence or explicit current expiry evidence appears.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pocket Gamer, Beebom, and Dexerto still show some older predecessor codes as active, while Destructoid, GamesRadar, Pro Game Guides, PC Gamer, and PCGamesN support expiry or omission more strongly. Official Trello is stale and not useful for today.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not restore unless official evidence appears or active-source agreement becomes stronger than the stale-listing pattern.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom supports the stored no-raid-key bundle, while Dexerto lists a raid-key bundle. Current active-state sources do not settle the exact reward conflict.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep the stored exact bundle until official evidence or stronger exact-source agreement confirms a different reward.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom, Dexerto, and PC Gamer support the stored newer-code bundles, while PCGamesN swaps or reduces the two newest reward bundles.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep stored bundles because more exact sources support them.

source_conflicts.conflict: GamesRadar June 2 still gives explicit per-code requirements: 12,500 for the two May 25 additions and restart/content codes, and 7,500 for GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. No newer official level-gate source was accessible.
source_conflicts.next_step: Use explicit per-code level rows unless official evidence or a newer source provides more specific requirements.
